summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Phase 2 - New Landing Page, Login, and Registration features. All backend APIs (18 tests) passed 100%. Frontend UI testing confirmed all required sections and features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing Page - Hero Section with Hakim character and speech bubbles
Landing Page - Journey Section (رحلة المدرسة) with 4 steps navigation
Landing Page - AI Section (الذكاء الاصطناعي) with 4 capability cards
Landing Page - Ecosystem Section (النظام البيئي) with 4 role cards
Landing Page - CTA Section with register button
Landing Page - Footer section
Landing Page - Hakim floating assistant opens chat dialog
Login Page - Two-column design with brand side and form side
Login Page - Back to Website button navigates to landing page
Login Page - Language toggle switches between Arabic/English
Login Page - Email and password inputs with validation
Login Page - Remember me checkbox
Login Page - Forgot password link
Login Page - Register link
Login Page - Successful login with new credentials (info@nassaqapp.com)
Login Page - Redirects to admin dashboard after login
Register Page - Two-column design with brand side and form side
Register Page - 4-step wizard with step indicators
Register Page - Step 1: Basic Info (name, phone)
Register Page - Step 2: Privacy Policy with checkbox
Register Page - Step 3: Account Type selection (School/Teacher)
Register Page - Step 4: Complete Info based on account type
Register Page - Back to Website button
Register Page - Language toggle
Register Page - Previous/Next navigation between steps
Register Page - Submit button creates registration request
Register Page - Redirects to login after successful submission
API: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful
API: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials rejected
API: GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user
API: POST /api/registration-requests - Creates school request
API: POST /api/registration-requests - Creates teacher request
API: GET /api/registration-requests - Admin can view requests
API: GET /api/dashboard/stats - Returns platform statistics
API: GET /api/schools - Returns schools list
API: POST /api/schools - Creates new school
API: POST /api/hakim/chat - AI assistant responds
API: POST /api/seed/admin - Seeds admin user

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components and flows working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 testing complete. New landing page with Hero, Journey, AI, Ecosystem, CTA sections all working. Login and Register pages have two-column design with Back to Website and Language toggle buttons. Multi-step registration (4 steps) creates registration requests for admin review. Admin credentials: info@nassaqapp.com / NassaqAdmin2026!##$$HBJ. All APIs tested and working. Hakim AI assistant floating button opens chat dialog.
